meaning: n.[希神]Jason寻找金羊毛所乘的船 [天]南船座
examples: Bring Pelops to the plateau in Argos.
Construct a Capitol on Argos and destroy 1 enemy Town Center.
Construct a Capitol on Argos and destroy 2 enemy Town Centers.
And sure enough, they gave firms like Argos and Amazon a pretty happy Christmas.
Sales jumped at the Argos catalogue shopping chain during the key Christmas and New Year trading period.
